name: Indicator
description: Renders a small status badge or dot on the corner of another element.

slots.default: The target element to be decorated by the indicator.
slots.label: Optional label (e.g. number) to render inside the indicator dot.

color.description: Background color of the indicator dot.

processing.description: Adds a pulse animation to the indicator.

inline.description: Wraps the content in a relative container.

withBorder.description: Renders a border around indicator to contrast with target background.
